name: advisor-comp-studio
viteplus: Local dev uses Vite+ (vp dev / vp check / vp build / vp test). These npm scripts stay plain `vite` so Vercel + CI need no `vp`. Vercel: build `npm run build`, output `dist`.
comment: frappe-ui (0.1.278, pinned exact) is ADOPTED as the UI system (Espresso/Inter preset + components + templates), frontend-only via the verified recipe in research/EMPIRICAL.md: frappe-ui/vite plugin (Frappe bits off) + optimizeDeps feather-icons + ESM tailwind.config.js with the frappe-ui/tailwind preset + import 'frappe-ui/style.css'. We import components by name and do NOT call app.use(FrappeUI) (it opens socket.io / installs the Frappe RPC layer — backend-bound). frappe-charts pinned exact (1.6.2 ships no dist css; styles self-inject).
